product.name: ArBo Dark
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra fire resistant, world's strongest synthetic fabrics from Pbo (polyphenylene benzobisoxazole)
product.titleDescriptor: 58% para Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon fabric, 220 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 220 g/m², 58% p-Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Plain Fabric
descriptions: World's strongest systhetic fabric which contains Pbo (poly phenylene benzobisoxazole)
220 g/m², 58% p-Aramid, 40% Pbo, 2% Carbon. ArBo Dark is designed for miltary application.
ArBo Dark is ultra fire resistant fabric
Flame resistant (Flame retardant) fabric with EN 469 certification.
ArBo Dark is the best fabric in all categories for military applications.
58% para Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon fabric, 220 gr/m'2
220 g/m², 58% p-Aramid 40% Pbo 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, Plain Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 58% p-Aramid (p-AR) 40% PBO (Pbo) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>5500N; Weft>5000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>270N ; Weft>310N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
applicationImageLabels: Pbo Dark 4 layer firefighter suit side

acceptedMatches.rationale: Product is explicitly described as firefighter fabric, certified to EN 469, and depicted in firefighter suit application images.

evidence: descriptions: 'ArBo Dark is designed for military application.'
descriptions: 'ArBo Dark is the best fabric in all categories for military applications.'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Multiple explicit statements directly assign this fabric to military applications.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic property (EN 1149-5) present, but no explicit statement linking to electrical/energy sector use.

primary.rationale: The product is directly branded as firefighter fabric, EN 469 certified, and depicted in firefighter suit images, making firefighting the dominant, most direct commercial application.

evidence: descriptions: 'ArBo Dark is designed for military application.'
descriptions: 'ArBo Dark is the best fabric in all categories for military applications.'
secondary.rationale: Multiple explicit statements independently assign the fabric to military applications, distinct from the firefighting use, supporting it as a valid secondary application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Antistatic property (EN 1149-5) alone does not establish an energy-sector end use per rule 8.
More specific named sectors (firefighting, military) are explicitly stated, so generic industrial workwear does not apply.

secondaryEvidence: descriptions: 'ArBo Dark is designed for military application.'
descriptions: 'ArBo Dark is the best fabric in all categories for military applications.'
normalized.primaryRationale: The product is directly branded as firefighter fabric, EN 469 certified, and depicted in firefighter suit images, making firefighting the dominant, most direct commercial application.
normalized.secondaryRationale: Multiple explicit statements independently assign the fabric to military applications, distinct from the firefighting use, supporting it as a valid secondary application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Antistatic property (EN 1149-5) alone does not establish an energy-sector end use per rule 8.
More specific named sectors (firefighting, military) are explicitly stated, so generic industrial workwear does not apply.
